title: Vineyard Irrigation Trellis Sizing
strategies: trivial: uniform a_max sizing (evaluator baseline, always feasible) -> ~0.1
greedy: single-pass fully-stressed design (area = |force|/sigma); passes the yield gate but busts the sag gate on tight instances -> 0 there
strong: fully-stressed design + displacement-gate repair (scale areas up until sag limit met); feasible on both gates and far lighter than baseline
invalid: uniform a_min sizing -> stresses exceed yield everywhere -> 0
